faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

faqs.question: What are the jobs available after studying design?
faqs.answer:
Fashion Designer, Textile Designer, Accessory Designer, Interior Designer, Graphic Designer, Web Designer, Game Designer, and Furniture Designer are some of the job profiles available after studying design courses. Designer pay may vary depending on a number of factors, including cities or demand. Your degree's worth may differ between cities. There are more offices and enterprises in big cities, which increases your chances of finding work.
Graduates in design have a wide range of employment possibilities.

college_info.intro: IIBM Institute of Business Management offers around 11 UG, PG and diploma courses to the students. The courses provided by the institute include BBA, MBA, Master Programme in Business Administration+3 Certifications, Executive Master Programme in Business Administration, Executive Master Programme in Business Administration+ 4 Certifications, Diploma Programme in Business Administrations, Diploma Programme in Business Administrations+ Master Programme in Business Administration, etc. Below are the details regarding the IIBM Institute of Business Management popular programmes:

placements.overview:
IIBM Institute of Business Management has been an Ed Tech Company since 2008 and is a member of EAHEA, QAHE, MMA, CII, IPMA, & FIEO. The institute offers DBA, MBA, and BBA programs & various diploma courses specially designed for working professionals. We cater to a broad spectrum of learners, spanning from graduates to seasoned professionals aged 25 to 55+. Our offerings include a comprehensive range, from undergraduate courses and job-linked programs to executive education and doctoral studies.

IIBM Institute of Business Management offers around 11 UG, PG and diploma courses to the students. The courses provided by the institute include BBA, MBA, Master Programme in Business Administration+3 Certifications, Executive Master Programme in Business Administration, Executive Master Programme in Business Administration+ 4 Certifications, Diploma Programme in Business Administrations, Diploma Programme in Business Administrations+ Master Programme in Business Administration, etc. Below are the details regarding the IIBM Institute of Business Management popular programmes:

IIBM Institute of Business Management admissions are based on merit. Moreover, candidates need to fulfil the eligibility criteria for admission to various courses. For undergraduate progammes, students should have passed from a recognised board. Further, for postgraduate programmes, students should have passed graduation/ diploma.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: IIBM Institute of Business Management provides various undergraduate, postgraduate and diploma programmes. The fees for these courses range between INR 45,000 to INR 68,000. The duration of these courses ranges between 11 months to two years. Below are the details regarding the IIBM Institute of Business Management courses, fees, and eligibility:

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding G. Venkataswamy Naidu College Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

placements.overview: UG Degree (3 year) : In year 2018-19, for 3 year UG Degree, a total of 595 students were admitted at G. Venkataswamy Naidu College and 579 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 579 students 74 were placed with median salary of INR 120000 and 112 students opted for higher studies. A total of 605 students were admitted in year 2019-20 for 3 year UG degree at G. Venkataswamy Naidu Collegeand 537 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 537 students 355 were placed with median salary of INR 175000 and 140 students opted for higher studies. PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 69 students were admitted at G. Venkataswamy Naidu College and 56 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 56 students 15 were placed with median salary of INR 144000. A total of 95 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at G. Venkataswamy Naidu Collegeand 87 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 87 students 27 were placed with median salary of INR 160000 and 1 students opted for higher studies.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: G. Venkataswamy Naidu College provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Accounting & Commerce, and have a fee structure of around INR 2,186 to 2,606. UG programs include B.Sc., BCA and B.Com. Further, the PG programs include M.Sc., M.Com and M.A.

faqs.answer: A:    G. Venkataswamy Naidu College is a well-known institution for M.Phil, M.Sc, M.A, M.Com, B.Sc, BBA, B.Com, B.A. courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. G. Venkataswamy Naidu College has course specializations in Computer Science, English, Mathematics, Electronics, Statistics, Chemistry, Physics, Botany.

reviews_list.review_title: G.Venkataswamy Naidu College, founded in 1996, offers courses in arts, commerce, and science.

review_content.Placements: More than 60 students finished this degree with me. Business-related packages were more common in this degree. Graduates of this degree were mostly in banking and accounting related jobs. About 75% of students who studied in this college passed the interview.
review_content.Infrastructure: Totally, there were 4 types of labs in this college. All labs had an internet facility and an air-conditioner facility. In this college, the classrooms were maintained clean and well ventilated. The college environment was maintained cleanly. Our college canteen provided healthy and clean food. There was no hostel for students.

content.Placements: More than 60 students finished this degree with me. Business-related packages were more common in this degree. Graduates of this degree were mostly in banking and accounting related jobs. About 75% of students who studied in this college passed the interview.
content.Infrastructure: Totally, there were 4 types of labs in this college. All labs had an internet facility and an air-conditioner facility. There was no hostel for students.

college_info.intro: Medhavi Skills University popular programmes are BTech Computer Science Engineering, BSc Hospitality & Hotel Management, MBA, BBA, BCA, BPharm, BSc Biotechnology, and BSc Nursing. The university follows an Industry-Led Learning Model and hence provides practical learning opportunities to students. The university is known to offer on the job training opportunities to students. The university focuses on a competency-based evaluation process rather than purely theoretical examinations. The college provides scholarships to students which ensures that all students have equal opportunity to complete their education at this university. BTech students can become Engineers and can also join various top companies at top positions. Below mentioned are some of the Medhavi Skills University courses and their respective eligibility and Medhavi Skills University fee:

faqs.answer: A:    The Industry-Led Learning Model at the Medhavi Skills University is an approach to education and training that aligns academic programmes with the knowledge, skills, and competencies demanded by industries. It emphasizes collaboration between educational institutions and industry partners to create a curriculum, provide hands-on experience, and foster employability.
faqs.question: What is the Industry Led Learning Model at Medhavi Skills University?

faqs.answer: A:    Medhavi Skill University MSc eligibility criteria is merit-based. To be eligible for admission into this course, students must have completed a BSc in Biotechnology/ Biochemistry/ Microbiology/ Botany/ Zoology/ Life Sciences/ Biomedical Sciences/ Chemistry or BPharm. The degree must be from a recognised institute/ university. Further, students need to appear for MSAT. Eligible students can apply online for the course by filling out the application form.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MSc at Medhavi Skills University?

faqs.answer: A:    Medhavi Skills University admission is primarily merit-based. However, students need to sit for the Medhavi Scholarship and Aptitude Test (MSAT). Further, if required, the university may conduct additional selection rounds, such as personal interviews. It is important that students fulfil the minimum educational qualification of the desired course to be eligible for admission. Aspirants can apply online at the official website of the university.
faqs.question: Can I join Medhavi Skills Univeristy without entrance exam?

There are several specialisations available in BBA including Brand Management & Communication, Hospitality Business Management, Media & Entertainment, Sports Management, Venture Planning & Family Business etc. To get admission in BBA, candidates must have passed Class 12 from any recognised board.
faqs.question: What is the BBA fee for Medhavi Skills University Sikkim?

review_content.General: Wi-Fi is installed in every department and building. The average MS is 40 MSN. Lab facilities are really good, and there are radiology machines to understand it. The library is small, but there are lots of knowledgeable books. About the mess, not hostel people, but those who are not opting for hostels are also eating in the mess at the college, as it’s really tasty, affordable, and delicious. The mess is really delicious and can compete with really good colleges in India. As for medical facilities, there is a polyclinic in our school to provide medications, and our health skills teacher is a nurse.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. In Medical Laboratory Science - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Future ready Medhavi, where skills meet your needs.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 250 students were placed in our course this year, including me. The highest package was 62,000, but with the scholarship benefits, its only 49,000 per semester of 6 months, or 98,000 per year. The companies that recruit for the courses available are the Ferns, multi-specialty hospitals, Reliance, etc. Recently all of our seniors went for their internships from various courses, like in the Mayfair hotel and resort, the STNM hospital here in Sikkim, etc. The roles offered in our courses are the designed posts that are required for the company.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Medical Radiology & Imaging Technology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: This is a new college.

review_content.Placements: I am a student at BRIT. We have a total of 80 students in our course. I have no idea about the placement percentage, but some got the highest packages, ranging from 30 lacs to 5 lacs per annum. Manipal Hospital, Fortis Healthcare, and diagnostic centers recruit from our college. BRIT students have not completed their 6th semester, so I don't have the actual placement details. Top roles include radiologist and radiology technician.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is segregated into 5 places. The classes are well-colored with smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, and a library designed to facilitate learning in a conducive environment. Medhavi provides hostels for both girls and boys to ensure a comfortable and secure environment.

review_summary.college_name: Medhavi Skills University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc in Optometry - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: MSU sikkim is a very nice .

content.Placements: More than 60% of students were placed in our course. The highest is 3 LPA the lowest is 1.5 LPA and the average is 2 LPA. There are many companies where students get internships More than 60%. They provide 100% internship to the students and they are a trusted university among all.
content.Infrastructure: So basically I'm from a medical background. So the Wi-Fi is free and the lab is very nice as well as the classroom but the library is small They have ever facilities such as a canteen mess as well as medical facilities. Medhavi Skill University provides an annual sports fest also.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc in Optometry - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Being a Medhavian student.

content.Placements: Recently, BBA and MBA seniors got their placements in good companies in Bangalore. The lowest is 20,000, and the highest is 40,000. Top recruiting companies include Apollo, Aditya Birla Group, etc. Currently, I’m just a newbie student, and 10-15 students got their internships. Top roles such as music as a career and, as a non-science student, you could be able to role in the medical background by doing a diploma or ECCT in the science background.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is installed in every department and building. The average MS is 40 MSN. Lab facilities are really good, and there are radiology machines to understand it. The library is small, but there are lots of knowledgeable books. About the mess, not hostel people, but those who are not opting for hostels are also eating in the mess at the college, as it’s really tasty, affordable, and delicious. The mess is really delicious and can compete with really good colleges in India. As for medical facilities, there is a polyclinic in our school to provide medications, and our health skills teacher is a nurse.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. In Medical Laboratory Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Future ready Medhavi, where skills meet your needs.

content.Placements: Approximately 250 students were placed in our course this year, including me. The highest package was 62,000, but with the scholarship benefits, its only 49,000 per semester of 6 months, or 98,000 per year. The companies that recruit for the courses available are the Ferns, multi-specialty hospitals, Reliance, etc. Recently all of our seniors went for their internships from various courses, like in the Mayfair hotel and resort, the STNM hospital here in Sikkim, etc. The roles offered in our courses are the designed posts that are required for the company.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Radiology & Imaging Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: This is a new college.

content.Placements: I am a student at BRIT. We have a total of 80 students in our course. I have no idea about the placement percentage, but some got the highest packages, ranging from 30 lacs to 5 lacs per annum. Manipal Hospital, Fortis Healthcare, and diagnostic centers recruit from our college. BRIT students have not completed their 6th semester, so I don't have the actual placement details. Top roles include radiologist and radiology technician.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is segregated into 5 places. The classes are well-colored with smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, and a library designed to facilitate learning in a conducive environment. Medhavi provides hostels for both girls and boys to ensure a comfortable and secure environment.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. In Medical Laboratory Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: "Skill University: Learning Beyond the Classroom"

content.Placements: The student need to obtain 70% to be eligible for placements. Many companies and hospitals came to our college for placement like hotel Hyatt and central research hospital. The highest package offered was 3.4 lakhs per annum by hotel Hyatt for hotel management course.
content.Infrastructure: The library is quite small in our college and the books are very less. Everyday in the last class we have the club activity and sports activities. Nss and other club are available. The classrooms are also bit too small and congested and but others are good.

admission_overview.college_name: Medhavi Skills University Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

paragraphs: Medhavi Skills University admission 2025is merit-based for both undergraduate and postgraduate courses. Students can enrol by applying online at the official website of the university. The university accepts applicants based on their performance in the last qualifying exam.Medhavi Skills Universityoffers a variety of undergraduate and postgraduate courses in the fields of Engineering, Technology, Management, Nursing, and more. Additionally, students can also pursue diploma courses at the university. Students interested in joining the university can read the following article to know all about the university's offered programmes, their eligibility criteria, and the admission process.

Students seeking to join the university need to follow the entire process of admission before applying. The university offers its courses in full-time mode. Check out the Medhavi Skills University admission 2025 details below:
Particulars
Medhavi Skill University Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Full-time/ Offline
Application status 2025
Programmes Offered
Level of programmes offered
UG, PG & Diploma
Popular programmes
BTech CSE| BSc| MBA| BBA| BCA| BPharm| BSc Biotechnology| BSc Nursing

Medhavi Skills University course admissionis subject to the preset admission criteria. Candidates looking to enrol in the UG courses offered at the university need to pass Class 12 from a recognised board. Similarly, PG admissions require students to complete graduation. Students must fulfil both the admission criteria of the desired course. Additonally, students need to provide the MSAT (Medhavi Scholarship & Aptitude Test) scores as well. The table below showcases the eligibility and selection criteria for popularMedhavi Skills University courses:

The admission procedure for Medhavi Skills University includes several steps from application to selection followed by admission confirmation. Candidates interested in joining the university can apply online for the desired course at the official website of the university. Students can first check whether they satisfy the admission criteria of the course they seek to join. Eligible students can follow the steps listed below to complete the Medhavi Skills University admission process:
Step 1: Application Process

Interested candidates can apply for the desired programme by visiting the official website of the university and filling out the application form. To submit the form, students must provide the required information and documents along with paying the application fees.
Step 2: Selection Process

Students are shortlisted based on their academic performance along with MSAT scores. The university may conduct further selection rounds, such as entrance tests or personal interviews if it deems it necessary.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
Once an admission offer is made, selected students need to pay the admission fees to secure their spot at the university.

faqs.answer: Medhavi Skills University admission is primarily merit-based. However, students need to sit for the Medhavi Scholarship and Aptitude Test (MSAT). It is important that students fulfil the minimum educational qualification of the desired course to be eligible for admission. Aspirants can apply online at the official website of the university.

faqs.question: Are admissions open at Medhavi Skills University?
faqs.answer: Yes,Medhavi Skills University admissions are openfor various courses. Students interested in joining the univeristy need to apply online for the desired programme and complete the admission process for the same. Candidates need to sit for the MSAT exam as well. Students are advised to apply before admissions close to increase their chances of getting a seat at the university. For any queries, students can connect with the admission desk of the university.

faqs.question: How can students apply for admission to various courses at Medhavi Skills University?

The next step is to click on the Apply Now tab. The next step is to fill out the application form with complete details. The next step is to submit the application form along with the application fees.

college_info.intro: NIELIT Calicut's flagship programmes are MTech and certificate courses offered by the institute. After taking several certificate courses, students will be able to make small presentations and will have all the necessary skills required for a successful career. Certificate courses are easy to pursue and provide great flexibility to students. Along with the short-term courses, NIELIT Calicut also provides long-term courses such as MTech in Embedded Systems and MTech in Electronics Design Technology to students. Some of them are 'O' level, 'A' level, and 'B' level courses. Students opting for these courses are taught Information Technology Tools and Network Basics, the Internet of Things and its Applications, and others. Below mentioned are some of the courses and their respective eligibility and NIELIT Calicut fees:

placements.overview: National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Calicut offers placement assistance to students. The institute conducts various recruitment drives for students. The college has an online placement portal that permits the free registration and submission of various details by NIELIT qualifiers. A total of 47 students were placed in leading companies such as Intel, NXP Semiconductors and Code Labs during NIELIT Calicut MTech placements 2021. Further, a total of 179 students were placed in companies such as Wipro, Cognizant and Infosys during NIELIT Calicut PG Diploma placements 2021.

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, NIELIT Calicut follows a seat reservation for the M.Tech course. The reservations shall be as per the existing government rules. Moreover, the seats are reserved for SC/ ST categories, and in each specialsiations, five seats are reserved for the sponsored category candidates. Moreover, admission shall normally be restricted to those with a valid GATE score, and seats shall be filled based on GATE score merit. However, this stipulation is relaxed in the case of sponsored candidates.
faqs.question: Does NIELIT Calicut offers seat reservation for M.Tech course?

course_faqs.question: Is it worth pursuing M.Tech at NIELIT Calicut?
course_faqs.answer: National Institute of Electronics & Information Technology, Calicut is a reputed university. NIELIT Calicut is an autonomous scientific society under the administrative control of the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology, Government of India. NIELIT Calicut is an affiliate with the APJ Abdul Kalam Technical University, Kerala and is recognised by AICTE. The National Institute of Electronics & Information Technology is ISO certified. At the postgraduate level, the NIELIT Calicut off

course_faqs.question: Does NIELIT Calicut offers scholarships to M.Tech students?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, NIELIT Calicut does offer scholarships to M.Tech students in the form of an assistantship. Moreover, to get this scholarship, candidates are required to follow certain eligibility criteria mentioned in the official sources. Additionally, the stipend offered by the scholarship is disbursed directly to the student's bank account via the AICTE-Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) portal. The payment is based on monthly attendance.

overview_faqs.question: Is National Institute of Electronics & Information Technology, Calicut a good college for M.Tech?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, the National Institute of Electronics & Information Technology Calicut is considered a good college for pursuing an MTech. NIELIT Calicut offers PG, Diploma and short-term courses in the fields of Computer Application, Technology, Science, etc. Further, the National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Calicut offers online courses for students and professionals in the field of Science and Technology. Also, NIELIT Calicut has a practical-oriented curriculum, strong faculty with industry experience, and good placement opportunities in related sectors such as embedded systems development.

overview_faqs.question: Is NIELIT Calicut a good college for M.Tech?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, NIELIT Calicut is considered a good option for M.Tech, specially for electronics and information technology. They offer programs in Embedded Systems and Electronic Design Technology, and the college has a strong facilities for it's programs. Admission to the NIELIT IS based on GATE scores and interviews.

overview_faqs.question: Is the National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology, Calicut a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Calicut is a good college. National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology, Calicut is a part of NIELIT group. National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology was established in 1989. The National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology offers 24 courses in two streams and seven specialisations. The courses offered by the institute are as Postgraduate, Postgraduation Diploma, advancedDiplomaand a doctorate course. The highest salary offered by the National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology in 2018 was INR 7.50 LPA.

overview_faqs.question: How is the National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology, Calicut for M.Tech courses?
overview_faqs.answer: The National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Calicut offers Master of Technology courses in two different specialisations including MTech in Embedded Systems and MTech in Electronics Design and Technology. The duration of the course is two years. The total tuition fee for the Master of Technology courses is INR 2.69 lakh (for 2 years). Refundable caution deposit INR 5000 (included in total fee). The project work of two-semester duration is part of the course and can be done in an Industry or National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Calicut during the third and fourth semesters.

paragraphs: NIELIT Calicut offers PG course, diploma and short-term courses in the fields of Computer Application, Technology, Science, among others. Further, the National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Calicut offers online courses for students and professionals in the field of Science and Technology.

The mode of application at NIELIT Calicut is online. NIELIT Calicut MTech admission is done basis the GATE entrance exam score. Further, admission to PG diploma, advance diploma and online courses at NIELIT Calicut is done basis merit. NIELIT Calicut admission to certificate programmes such as BCC, CCC and O level courses is done basis the NIELIT entrance exam.
The top courses offered by NIELIT Calicut along with the application status, fee and accepted entrance exam details are presented below:

NIELIT Calicut offers a two-year MTech programme that is approved by AICTE. NIELIT Calicut is affiliated to APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University to offer MTech programme. NIELIT Calicut MTech admission is done basis the GATE entrance exam score. However, preference will be given to Non-GATE candidates from the Kerala state to fill the vacant seats.

description: As per the GATE cutoff 2025, the top two most challenging M.E./M.Tech specialisations were M.Tech. in Automotive Electronics and M.Tech. in Automotive Electronics with last round cutoff scores of 362 and 362, respectively, for the General AI quota. In the table below, candidates can view the branch-wise first and last round cutoff scores.

Tabulated below are the GATE CCMT last round cutoff scores for 2025, 2024 and 2023 across different rounds, categories and quotas. For the General AI quota, the last round cutoff scores varied between 350 and 362. While for the OBC category students, the final round cutoff scores were concluded between the range of 326 and 335 in the AI quota.

paragraphs: Yes. NIELIT Calicut offers merit-based and need-based scholarships to its students.

Yes, the National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology, Calicut offer scholarships. Protsahan Puraskar Scheme (Erstwhile Scholarship Scheme) students pursuing NIELIT. The Protsahan Puraskar Scheme will be applicable for SC/ST/physically handicapped and female candidates who are pursuing O/A/B/C level courses of the NIELIT (DOEACC) as a full-time courses through an institute authorised to conduct the DOEACC accredited courses. Candidates shall have to clear the papers in the first attempt and complete the courses in many attempts given in subsequent paragraphs. The income of the parents of the student from all sources shall not be more than INR 1 LPA.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Chemistry - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: This is the best college for M.Sc. in chemistry course.

content.Placements: There are well-paying positions at our college. Students can participate in vocational activities at our college. The offered minimum wage is between 4 LPA and 13 LPA. Depending on their qualifications, students will be paid 13 LPA. Among the high-level capabilities provided are data management and fitting.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure for my studies include Wi-Fi, Labs, classrooms, library, canteen, playground, etc. The hostel has good food in the mess and canteen. There are also clinics, sports, and games. My college is state-of-the-art and is being built for the future.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Zoology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Outstanding college - excellent facility and campus.

content.Placements: College placements are amazing. Primary roles include research assistants in the meat industry, animal welfare researchers, and junior scientists. An apprenticeship rate of 87% was obtained, and it was placed in larger institutions. Pay sales range from 3 LPA to 10.5 LPA. The average salary package offered is 7 LPA at top department in animal laboratories.
content.Infrastructure: Our course has excellent facilities and infrastructure of this college. The security is good. Classrooms are huge. Laboratories are large. All lab equipment is available in labs. All articles are available in the library. Library has a large reading room for students. This college has a hotel and a restaurant. The quality of the facilities in our hotel is good. The quality of the food in the hotel and restaurant is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Zoology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for the overall development of students.

content.Placements: Our college has a placement cell that facilitates career counseling and guides students for competitive examinations. It includes NET, GATE PSC, and IELTS coaching, and conducts webinars on overseas education, financial literacy, and soft skill workshops.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is spread over 10 acres of land. Our college has a library with 12 journals. Our college provides facilities like sports, a gym, a volleyball court, a basketball court, a playground, and labs for zoology, physics, botany, chemistry, CND, etc. Our college has various clubs like music, yoga, literature, NSS, and NCC. Our college has a botanical garden.

individual_reviews.title: This is the best college for girls.

content.Placements: There were 400 students in 4 sections. No companies came here to recruit students in our course. There were no salary packages.

college_info.intro:
Echelon Institute of Technology popular programmes are BTech and MBA. The college has set up an Industry Institute partnership cell and an Entrepreneurship Development Cell for the overall development of staff, faculty, BTech, MBA, and various other course students. Echelon Institute of Technology Faridabad aims for 360-degree holistic development of students through industry-oriented quality training and several extracurricular activities. BTech and MBA students are trained using modern methods of teaching. They are taught various technical and non-technical skills.
The college also provides a Minor Degree Programme with various courses such as CSE with Data Science, CSE with IOT, CSE with Cyber Security, ECE with IOT, ECE with Robotics, and others.
BTech and MBA students are placed in top companies such as Nagarro, PILC, and others. Overall, Echelon Institute of Technology is one of the best colleges offering quality education to students. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Echelon Institute of Technology and their respective eligibility and Echelon Institute of Technology Faridabad fees structure:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

reviews_list.review_title: It is an excellent college with good and experienced faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Placement support is decent. The placement cell brings companies with a reasonable profit range, and strong performers take good offers. The average package offered is aligned with industry standards. The top packages offered depend highly on our preparation. Workshops and mock interviews are the best.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure with greenery. The size of the campus is very large. Hostels are also available that are separate for both boys and girls. Wi-Fi connectivity is also available, but it is only in the academic block and is weaker in hostels. The overall ecosystem promotes focused learning.

review_summary.college_name: Echelon Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The best college for a technical course.

content.Placements: In my course, mostly 70% of students get placement. The highest package offered is 21 LPA, and the average package is 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Zomato, Microsoft, Wipro, and LinkedIn. Top roles offered by the companies are telecalling, web development, data analysis, and purchase assistance.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is so good, there are clean classes, well-hygiene washrooms, and an RO water service facility. There is Wi-Fi available in all classes, and the seminar halls are wide and have enough space for 200 students to be seated at once. Also, there are clean corridors.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good in infrastructure, syllabus, and they conduct excellent training every semester.

content.Placements: Well, it's better not to hope for even a single percent from this college, as barely anyone gets selected on campus because barely any companies come, and even if they do, they pay too little. There is no such top recruiting company. If I named them, everybody would say they have heard about this company for the first time, and it’s too hard to find them on Google, too. The top role offered in my course is web development.
content.Infrastructure: Well, I will say that in terms of infrastructure, this is the best. It's so goated that multiple movies, web series, and ads are being shot here. Classrooms are well-equipped with centralized AC, smart boards, speakers, and Wi-Fi. The library is also well-spaced and has a lot of books and quite a space to study. The hostel is also the best according to infrastructure, and the mess food, I would say, is okayish. Hostels have good Wi-Fi and hot and cold showers, and a sports ground.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is an excellent college with good and experienced faculty members.

content.Placements: Placement support is decent. The placement cell brings companies with a reasonable profit range, and strong performers take good offers. The average package offered is aligned with industry standards. The top packages offered depend highly on our preparation. Workshops and mock interviews are the best.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure with greenery. The size of the campus is very large. Hostels are also available that are separate for both boys and girls. Wi-Fi connectivity is also available, but it is only in the academic block and is weaker in hostels. The overall ecosystem promotes focused learning.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The perfect hub of technology .

content.Placements: I'm pursuing B.Tech, and the academics are so good that most of the students get placement from campus. There are around 80 percent of students who get placement from the campus. The highest package is 50 LPA in my course. The top recruiting companies of my course are Google, Wipro, Accenture, Yahoo, Zomato, Swiggy, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is overall good for Students. Our department has well-equipped labs, working project tools, smart classrooms, Wi-Fi access, and a decent library with enough books for reference. The hostel facilities are also satisfactory with clean rooms, drinking water, and proper security.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: One of the best budget-friendly colleges, with job opportunities, and a great environment.

content.Placements: One of the best campuses in Haryana to pursue B.Tech. Healthy environment and good jobs. The placement scenario for the CSE branch here is excellent. In our batch, I would say around 85-90 percent of students who sat for placements got placed. The college's placement cell works tirelessly from the third year itself. The salary packages are very encouraging. The highest package went to a remarkable 50.5 LPA (an exceptional off-campus placement), while the lowest is around 3.5 LPA. The average package for our CSE branch is comfortable between 5.5 LPA and 6 LPA, which is a fantastic start. Top recruiting companies visit our college.

admission_process.title: Echelon Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Echelon Institute of Technology's admission process includes registration and merit-list preparation of the entrance exam as per the respective courses. Candidates must follow the steps below to get a seat in the EIT:
STEP 1: Echelon Institute of Technology Application Process 2025
Aspirants can apply for various courses at the official website, i.e., https://eitfaridabad.com/ps/echelon-college/.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

The selection criteria at EIT are based on entrance exam scores. However, candidates have to complete the last educational qualification as per the respective courses set by the college. Students are selected based on various entrance exam scores such as GATE, JEE Main, CUET, etc, as per respective courses.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation

Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. The institute also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theEIT feesto confirm their seats at the institute.

placement_data.title: Echelon Institute of Technology Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: As per the latest report, the highest and average packages offered during Echelon Institute of Technology placements 2025 stood at INR 50.5 LPA and INR 5.3 LPA, respectively . The top recruiters of Echelon Institute of Technology placements in 2025 included Infosys, L&T, TCS, Samsung, HCL, Tech Mahindra, Wipro, Sony, Panasonic, Supertech , etc.

The placement process at Echelon Institute of Technology includes a comprehensive pre-placement training and skill development program for the students. The institute organizes more than 24 Enhancement programs (EEP) and invites 21 industries to train students in various domains like Personality Development, Quantitative Aptitude, Logical Reasoning, Verbal Reasoning, Group Discussion techniques, etc.
Earlier, the highest and average package offered during Echelon Institute of Technology placements 2024 stood at INR 50.5 LPA and INR 5.2 LPA, respectively .

The cutoffs are available in the form of ranks for different categories of students belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates interested in taking admission at Echelon Institute of Technology can check out the sections below to view the exam, course, and category-wise cutoff details. Echelon Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 was released via GGSIPU entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 248727 and 291452 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 248727, B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 177190.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 248727.

hostel_campus.college_name: Echelon Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The best college for a technical course.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is so good, there are clean classes, well-hygiene washrooms, and an RO water service facility. There is Wi-Fi available in all classes, and the seminar halls are wide and have enough space for 200 students to be seated at once. Also, there are clean corridors.

reviews.review_heading: Good in infrastructure, syllabus, and they conduct excellent training every semester.
reviews.review_text: Well, I will say that in terms of infrastructure, this is the best. It's so goated that multiple movies, web series, and ads are being shot here. Classrooms are well-equipped with centralized AC, smart boards, speakers, and Wi-Fi. The library is also well-spaced and has a lot of books and quite a space to study. The hostel is also the best according to infrastructure, and the mess food, I would say, is okayish. Hostels have good Wi-Fi and hot and cold showers, and a sports ground.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college with good and experienced faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure with greenery. The size of the campus is very large. Hostels are also available that are separate for both boys and girls. Wi-Fi connectivity is also available, but it is only in the academic block and is weaker in hostels. The overall ecosystem promotes focused learning.

reviews.review_heading: The perfect hub of technology .
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is overall good for Students. Our department has well-equipped labs, working project tools, smart classrooms, Wi-Fi access, and a decent library with enough books for reference. The hostel facilities are also satisfactory with clean rooms, drinking water, and proper security.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best budget-friendly colleges, with job opportunities, and a great environment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is genuinely one of the best things about Echelon. For our CSE department, the computer labs are modern, fully air-conditioned, and equipped with the latest software and high-speed internet. The Wi-Fi coverage across the academic blocks and the library is reliable. Classrooms are all smart with projectors, which makes learning interactive. The central library is huge and has a massive collection of books and digital resources.

reviews.review_heading: College infrastructure and facility.
reviews.review_text: Echloan Institute of Technology in its first structure is very good whole campus is under CCTV surveillance. We have smart classrooms with centralise AC and free Wi-Fi service. Sports ground, basketball ground, cricket ground, and medical room are also available 24X7. Ambulance service is available. Gym facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Echelon is the best college.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is unique from others. There are three buildings or departments available for different things administration, library, and the academic block/building. The quality of hostel is good. Mess provides good quality food to us, and it's healthy for us. The medical and sports facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied and dissatisfied for some of facilities.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very large, and provides good space for classes. The ground is very big. There are very good sports facilities. Canteen facilities are very good in quality, and the prices are very affordable. The chairs and tables are well arranged.

reviews.review_heading: Echelon Institute - Top choice for Delhi NCR students.
reviews.review_text: Echelon Institute of Technology had a big, green, and modern campus spread over 17.5 acres in Faridabad. College had smart classrooms with A/C, more than 70 well-equipped labs, and a large library with more than 50,000 books and digital resources. There were good hostel facilities for boys and girls with shared and single room options. Students got Wi-Fi all over the campus, a cafeteria, gym, sports grounds (like cricket, volleyball, basketball, and football), and medical support for emergencies...

reviews.review_heading:
Good placements, supportive faculty, and decent infrastructure
.
reviews.review_text: Our department has well-equipped computer labs, smart classrooms, projectors, and high-speed Wi-Fi accessible across campus. The library is rich with technical books, journals, and digital resources. Hostel facilities are satisfactory with spacious rooms, 24/7 water and electricity, and decent security. The mess food is average but hygienic, while the canteen offers a variety of snacks and meals. Basic medical facilities with a first-aid center and a tie-up hospital are available for emergencies...

reviews.review_heading: Well-qualified faculty, industry-relevant curriculum, and supportive environment.
reviews.review_text: The institute spans 17.5 acres of lush, and has well-maintained grounds. Campus features centralized AC buildings, smart classrooms equipped with audio-visual aids, and robust Wi-Fi connectivity throughout. Well, over 70 laboratories and workshops support hands-on learning across disciplines, ranging from electronics, mechanical, and data Science to general computer labs. Library is an air-conditioned, separate block housing a rich collection, around 32,000-40,000+ books, 58 or more national/int...

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and faculty members. It has decent placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides excellent infrastructure and facilities to support learning and overall development. Classrooms are spacious with projectors and WiFi access while the department has wellequipped laboratories including fluid mechanics thermodynamics CAD/CAM and workshop labs. Central library offers a wide collection of books journals and e resources. Hostel facilities are comfortable with furnished rooms 24/7 electricity WiFi and hygienic mess food. The canteen serves affordable meals and sn...

reviews.review_heading: Excellent faculty, infrastructure, placements, and hostel.
reviews.review_text: Echelon Institute of Technology offers modern infrastructure with well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, and an excellent library. The hostel is comfortable, safe, and student-friendly, making it a great environment for both learning and living. It is very good compared to others.

reviews.review_heading: This is a good college with placements. All professors and facilities in this college are good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, library, parking, and farewell events are available at my college. The classrooms have AC, and cleaning and maintenance are done regularly. The canteen charges Rs. 25 per plate, but the food is tasty, healthy, and worth the price. The college campus covers an area of 2km and has a no-smoking policy.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with growing opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is really nice. Wi-Fi facility is also available.  Mess food is really delicious. It has a green campus. Classrooms are well-equipped with projectors. There are decent sports grounds and indoor game facilities.

faqs.answer: A:    Government Maharani Laxmibai Girls Post Graduate College, Indore is a well-known institution for M.Com, M.Sc, M.A, B.Com, B.A, B.Sc, BBA, B.Lib.I.Sc. courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Government Maharani Laxmibai Girls Post Graduate College, Indore has course specializations in Food & Nutrition, Textile Design, Biotechnology, Computer Science, Biology, Home Science, Mathematics, Chemistry, Biochemistry.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Com. in Computer Application - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied because of less placement opportunities and bad infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: In our college maximum 15% or 20% students get placed in many local firms, small companies located in city. Salary package offered to them is approximately 1.5LPA to 2LPA which is not satisfied. Top jobs offered in our course are Assistant, accountant, computer operator, etc. Some of them are also selected for campus internship programmes.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college sports facilities are very good, many sports and games materials are provided to us along with proper guidance of coach. There is library with course books and reference books. There is hostel facility, but the mess food is not good, it is indigestible. There is labs for different departments and streams. No Wi-Fi facility, no well maintained classrooms, improper canteen which is always closed.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Com. in Tax Procedure - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good sports facility is available but has improper infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Only 10% to 20% students get placed, and the average salary package offered in this course is INR 2 LPA to 2.5 LPA. Top job roles offered in this course are Chartered Accountant, Tax Consultant, Tax Specialist, Cost Estimators, Lecturer, banking sector, etc. Some of the tax firms like EY also recruit students. 10% of the students get internships in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a hostel for girls but the mess food is very bad, quality is poor and unhygienic. Hostel has lights and fans. No Wi-Fi connection is provided to us or to the staff. There is a canteen but is mostly closed. Our classrooms are also not well maintained. There are sports facilities where different types of sports and games equipment are available. There are separate laboratories for different streams. There is no medical facility or first aid support available here.

review_summary.college_name: Government Maharani Laxmibai Girls Post Graduate College, Indore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good college with excellent faculty members and amazing facilities.

content.Placements: In our college, placement is limited because our college doesn't organize any external programs for placement and some companies come for placement. According to passout students, they receive about 2 to 3 lacs per year. Rare company visits our college. About 1/3 of the students got an internship. The top role offered in our college is B.Com., BBA and other commerce stream courses available.
content.Infrastructure: There is a well-stocked library present in our college, where a variety of books, magazines, journals, and newspapers are available. There is a canteen where mornings start with fabulous tea and a good breakfast. There is a hostel with proper furnishings and many top facilities, and the food is very good and acceptable. Sports and games facilities are also available with proper sports and games materials. Classrooms are well furnished with proper lighting and fans.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of bad placements of our college.

content.Placements: Placements opportunities are very bad, 10% to 12% students get placed in small firms and the salary offered to them is very less. Approximately. RS. 10000 to RS. 15000 per month. Which is really less and not good. 15% students get internships by college. Top roles offered in our course is about taxation, finances, business, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Very bad hostel facility is provided to us which is not maintained properly. Mess food is not acceptable at all and it is very bad taste. There are various labs for different departments. There library, all course books are available. There is Canteen with very poor facility always closed. Sports and games facility are good here, well experienced coach are facilitating the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Computer Application - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied because of less placement opportunities and bad infrastructure.

content.Placements: In our college maximum 15% or 20% students get placed in many local firms, small companies located in city. Salary package offered to them is approximately 1.5LPA to 2LPA which is not satisfied. Top jobs offered in our course are Assistant, accountant, computer operator, etc. Some of them are also selected for campus internship programmes.
content.Infrastructure: In our college sports facilities are very good, many sports and games materials are provided to us along with proper guidance of coach. There is library with course books and reference books. There is hostel facility, but the mess food is not good, it is indigestible. There is labs for different departments and streams. No Wi-Fi facility, no well maintained classrooms, improper canteen which is always closed.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Tax Procedure - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good sports facility is available but has improper infrastructure.

content.Placements: Only 10% to 20% students get placed, and the average salary package offered in this course is INR 2 LPA to 2.5 LPA. Top job roles offered in this course are Chartered Accountant, Tax Consultant, Tax Specialist, Cost Estimators, Lecturer, banking sector, etc. Some of the tax firms like EY also recruit students. 10% of the students get internships in our college.
content.Infrastructure: There is a hostel for girls but the mess food is very bad, quality is poor and unhygienic. Hostel has lights and fans. No Wi-Fi connection is provided to us or to the staff. There is a canteen but is mostly closed. Our classrooms are also not well maintained. There are sports facilities where different types of sports and games equipment are available. There are separate laboratories for different streams. There is no medical facility or first aid support available here.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Computer Application - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty members, good studies with nice atmosphere.

content.Placements: Placement experience is very bad! our seniors who are already passed out from college haven't been placed in either good or big companies. Some of them are placed in small and local firms with meagre package of only 1.5 LPA to 3 LPA. Top roles offered in my course come from domains of finance and business management. 20 to 30% of students are selected for internships in small companies and local firms.
content.Infrastructure: Our institute has average infrastructure, there are separate labs for every department, there is a library where our course books and references are available. There is a hostel too providing poor quality mess food that can hardly be eaten. Our classrooms aren't very well maintained as well.

Only the course books are easily available, and food at the mess is not good as much but recently improvement had started for food. Sports are very good and helpful to students.

reviews.review_heading: I'm dissatisfied with this college.

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Arena Animation, Preet Vihar Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

reviews_list.batch_info: Arena Animation International Program (AAIP-VFX) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Arena Animation, Preet Vihar is perfect in every way.

review_content.Placements: Arena Animation deals with some of the best companies in the market. Every week, we hear that our seniors are getting placed in some reputed companies with good salary packages. A year ago, my brother got a job, and now, he is getting the salary package of Rs. 50,000 per month. People can also work as the freelancer during the course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure in the college is not that good that it has to be, but still good in many ways. I like the way that they show the student's work. I also like a little inspiring graffiti which is in the college. Everything is good and impressively maintained. Every class has a unique centre of attraction.

reviews_list.batch_info: Graphics, Web Design and Development (GWDD) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Arena Animation, Preet Vihar.

review_content.Placements: It has been only 3 months for me, and it is decent as of now, as we have 1–2 hours of class per day for 5 days a week with additional assignments for practice which is essential. Various types of workshops are held here, which are surely beneficial to students. Almost I have completed 1 year in this course, and it was useful learning with various tools to know about. This institute will teach you only the basics, and the rest all depends on the individual on how they approach and develops their skill accordingly. I had a good experience learning about new tools and gathering knowledge in this field. I had a bad experience of getting a job. The institute is even willing to send you as a recommendation to various companies after they receive the full amount of the course. They sent our show-reels to quite a few companies just how a normal person looking for a job would send. Ultimately we had 1–2 job interviews with not much promising response. I got a job at a start-up company. The only good thing was that their stipend was high as compared to the other companies. More than 90% of students get placement in popular companies like Green Gold Animation, Maya Digital Studios, EBS, TCS, etc. Based on your skill and your work, they give you deployment in the companies as I have seen to my seniors. It has been 21 years as Arena Animation Multimedia is available with a good reputation.

This institute will teach you only the basics, and the rest all depends on the individual on how they approach and develops their skill accordingly. I had a good experience learning about new tools and gathering knowledge in this field. I had a bad experience of getting a job. The institute is even willing to send you as a recommendation to various companies after they receive the full amount of the course. They sent our show-reels to quite a few companies just how a normal person looking for a job would send. Ultimately we had 1–2 job interviews with not much promising response. I got a job at a start-up company. The only good thing was that their stipend was high as compared to the other companies. More than 90% of students get placement in popular companies like Green Gold Animation, Maya Digital Studios, EBS, TCS, etc. Based on your skill and your work, they give you deployment in the companies as I have seen to my seniors. It has been 21 years as Arena Animation Multimedia is available with a good reputation.

admission_process.title: Arena Animation Preet Vihar Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Arena Animation, Preet Vihar admission 2025 inquiry portal is open.The institute accepts candidates based on their performance in the last qualifying exam. Students can pursue certificate courses in the fields ofAnimation,VFX,Gaming,Web Design,and more.Arena Animation, Preet Vihar admission is merit-based. The programmes are certified and recognised by Media & Entertainment Skills Council (MESC). On completion ofArena Animation Preet Viharcourses, candidates are awarded a certificate of successful course completion.

ForArena Animation Preet Vihar course admission, candidates must meet the eligibility requirements of the courses as per the institution's admission guidelines. Eligible candidates can fill out the application form for admission. As admissions are on a first-come first-served basis, no other selection round is required for admissions. Students can refer to the following table to know about the eligibility and selection criteria forArena Animation Preet Vihar course:
*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Arena Animation Preet Vihar has a pretty simple admission process, which doesn't involve any complex selection process. The institute provides Certificate programmes under various specialisations. All candidates must do is fulfill the eligibility criteria and directly apply for their desired course. Find the admission procedure below:
Step 1: Arena Animation Preet Vihar Application Process

Candidates must visit the official website ofArena Animation Preet Vihar( https://www.arena-multimedia.com/in/en/ ) and fill out the inquiry form for information. The application form will be available on the website. Interested students must fill out the application form with all details and submit it with the required fee.
Step 2: Arena Animation Preet Vihar Selection Process
After filling out the application form, aspirants need to wait for the admission letter. The institute selects candidates based on their performance in the last qualifying exam.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation

After filling out the form, candidates can be asked to submit the required documents and pay the admission fee for admission confirmation. The institute then shall inform the student regarding the class schedule and other important details.

review_content.Placements: Placements at Adhitya College of Engineering are good. Many companies, like Google and other companies, provide placements. We have an internship program every week. Almost 85% of the students get placed here. The highest package was 25-30 LPA, and the lowest was 8.65 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure here is good, and it has nice ventilation. The area around the college is surrounded by greenery, and the scenery is beautiful. classrooms are well-maintained and neat. Labs and library are great, and the nearby hostels are also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the infrastructure of both the college and hostel, no placement.

review_content.Placements: 49% on average, it would be around 40-49%, which is average and should be more. 4 lacs, 2.4 lacs, and 3 lacs are the most appropriate. Zuventus is the leading company that was hiring students only for MR jobs, nothing else. No research.
review_content.Infrastructure: No Wi-Fi, simple labs, simple classrooms, average library where there are more restrictions than the books that are actually needed. The worst hostel with double-decker Bed (6 pax in a single room), average canteen, no medical facilities, decent auditorium.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It was very excellent college in placement.

content.Placements: The passing percentage of students in our colleges is 50%. The highest or lowest average package in our colleges is 10 Lacs. For our B.Pharma course, the companies that hire us are drug companies and hospitals. The passing percentage of students for internships is 50%. The top rules of our colleges are 10 + 2 with pcmb or PCB courses in PU.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a good faculty, including Padmashree and Paul Richards. The labs are well-equipped, and the classrooms are clean and well-ventilated. The college has a good canteen and a variety of sports facilities, including Kabaddi and football.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Poor facilities in college and hostel.

content.Placements: The placement percentage is lower through the college. The internship is also taking so much time and tasks to complete. Some department students will get placement through the college. Only some students get placement, and some students didn't get placement.
content.Infrastructure: The number of classrooms is less for our department. The library facility is good. Wi-Fi is not available for the students. The hostel food is the worst one because they didn't maintain hygiene. Some hostels are enough to live in, but some hostels don't have hygiene and facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Aditya Group of Institutions.

content.Placements: Students got placed in good companies like Paytm and start-up companies. The highest salary package offered is 9 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 6 LPA. The internship percentage is 95%. Top roles offered are HR, accountant, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good and well-maintained. We have computer labs and a library. All classrooms are good and well-maintained. Our college has presentation rooms. All hostels are good and well-maintained. Our college provides security. The warden teaches us about the rules and regulations. The food served in the canteen is good.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with our college, and I have learnt many good things.

content.Placements: Almost 70-90% of the students got placed. Mphasis and many companies interacted with our college. Finance specialist is the top role offered. On the campus, we have many rounds, and it is not easy in the placements. We have CRT classes, aptitude tests, etc., before we go to placements. Top companies visit our college.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides labs and a library, and there are library cards for students. Classrooms are good, and facilities for hostels and canteen are also good. Students in hostels are very good, and hostels have good food. They provide milk, fruits and non-vegetarian every week, and the food is hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Aditya Group of Institutions is really superb.

content.Placements: Our college has excellent placements with more than 60% placement rate. Very easy and quality education is provided in our college. It is a very disciplined and good college. More than 200 companies visit our college to offer placements for students. Our college provides surely provides placements. In our college, the study is excellent, and overall, it is a superb college.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are very good and affordable, and they are very clean. All the facilities like a library, playground and canteen are available. The quality of the food served here is very good, and the maintenance is also very good. Caretakers are very polite, and the rooms are good. The sanitization is very good, and the bathrooms available are excellent and are cleaned regularly.

admission_process.title: Aditya Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Aditya Group of Institutions admission 2025 isopen. The institute offers admission to courses such asMBA, BSc, BTech BCA, and BComat the UG level and PG level. Aditya Group of Institutions admissions are completelymerit-based. Candidates are required to full fill the basic eligibility to secure seats in UG and PG courses at the college. Moreover, applications for all the courses are accepted in online mode only at theAditya Group of Institutions. Read the below article for more information about Aditya Group of Institutions' admission process, course eligibility and selection criteria:

Aditya Group of Institutions admission is merit-based. The institute considers multiple parameters while offering admission, which include fulfilling the minimum eligibility and selection criteria as per the course requirements. Tabulated below are theAditya Group of Institutions Courseseligibility and selection criteria:
Class 12 with 45% - 50%
Merit-based
Class 12 with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects
Merit-based
Class 12 with 35%
Merit-based
Class 12 with 35%
Merit-based

Aditya Group of Institutions admission process 2025 contains various steps which are required to be followed by the candidates for admission. The candidates looking for admission must need to full fill out the basic eligibility for admission. Want to know the step-by-stepAditya Group of Institutions admission process 2025, go through the following section.
Step 1: Aditya Group of Institutions Application Process

Candidates looking for admission to various programmes at Aditya Group of Institutions are required to fill out the admission form online. To fill out the application form candidates are required to visit the official website of the college.
Step 2: Aditya Group of Institutions Selection Round

According to the selection criteria, the candidates are required to passClass 10andClass 12for admission to UG programme, candidates must have a graduation degree for admission to PG courses. The college offers direct admission to the candidates based on the last exam qualifying exam score.
Step 3: Final Seat Confirmation
The selected candidates are required to pay theAditya Group of Institutions feewithin the given deadline to secure their seats.

faqs.question: How to get admission to Aditya Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: Aditya Group of Institutions admission 2025 is open. The college offers merit-based admission to all its UG courses. To be eligible for admission candidates must fulfil the eligibility criteria. For instance, UG candidates are required to complete their Class 10 and Class 12 and applicants looking for admission to courses at AGI must have a UG degree or class 12 degree.

faqs.question: Is there an entrance for admission to Aditya Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: No, there is no entrance exam required for admission to Aditya Group of Institutions. Admission to all the courses is merit-based at this college. Candidates are required to apply to the official website of the college and fill out the admission form. After the process is completed, the final seat allocation is based on the last qualifying exam score.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2030Offered by Aditya Bangalore Institute of Pharmacy Education and ResearchReviewed on 16 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges for pharmacy students.
reviews.review_text: This college has one of the best infrastructure. I am a Pharma.D student. Classrooms are good and labs are too clean. Library is also good, we will get required books from library. The hostel is also good. The canteen food is also good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Aditya College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 30 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best choosing college ever.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is located on campus, making it very convenient for attending classes. Rooms are share,  and the space isn't huge. It is sufficient for the basic needs of students like a library, a playground, a seminar hall, classrooms, and a canteen. The food provided is decent.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Aditya College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 30 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Very good college according to the fee charges and environment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here is good, and it has nice ventilation. The area around the college is surrounded by greenery, and the scenery is beautiful.  classrooms are well-maintained and neat. Labs and library are great, and the nearby hostels are also good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Aditya Bangalore Institute of Pharmacy Education and ResearchReviewed on 17 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the infrastructure of both the college and hostel, no placement.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi, simple labs, simple classrooms, average library where there are more restrictions than the books that are actually needed. The worst hostel with double-decker Bed (6 pax in a single room), average canteen, no medical facilities, decent auditorium.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Aditya College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 27 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: One of the good and best college to choose.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is good, well-maintained, and clean. The surrounding areas are wonderful, full of greenery, and the best part is you will have a peaceful site with very good ventilation. According to me, it is good in the fresh greenery area.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Aditya Bangalore Institute of Pharmacy Education and ResearchReviewed on 23 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: A very good college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is available in our course. The department of commerce is very good. Wi-Fi is available in our college. We have multiple labs for every sense. Classrooms are very hygienic. The quantity of the food in the hostel is very good in Muscat. We have medical faculty members to see students. We have multiple sports in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It was very excellent college in placement.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good faculty, including Padmashree and Paul Richards. The labs are well-equipped, and the classrooms are clean and well-ventilated. The college has a good canteen and a variety of sports facilities, including Kabaddi and football.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Aditya Bangalore Institute of Pharmacy Education and ResearchReviewed on 19 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Seniors told us that this college was in the top 5 best colleges in 2020. It's a great thing.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our college are what we like. The college structure, and canteen food, are really good. The classroom protection facilities, AC, and also 24*7 electricity. The chemistry lab arrangement is also really nice. Sports are rare during the period when we are completing our exams.

reviews.review_heading: Poor facilities in college and hostel.
reviews.review_text: The number of classrooms is less for our department. The library facility is good. Wi-Fi is not available for the students. The hostel food is the worst one because they didn't maintain hygiene. Some hostels are enough to live in, but some hostels don't have hygiene and facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Aditya College of PhysiotherapyReviewed on 4 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Almost good atmosphere and nice faculties. The campus is not much big, but education quality is best
reviews.review_text: The hostel is in the model of 2 BHK or 3 BHK apartments, consisting of a kitchen, one room with an attached bathroom, two rooms with a common bathroom, a hall, balcony, and kitchen. In college, we have a smart class system with presentations and projectors, along with a large lab with all facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Aditya College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 17 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Great Support by the Faculty
reviews.review_text: Separate hostels are available for boys and girls. Bus facilities are available and Wi-Fi is provided. Hostels are under CCTV surveillance, with sufficient space for students. Food is served on time and washing machines are available in the hostel. There are options for 2-sharing, 3-sharing and 4-sharing rooms in the hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Aditya Bangalore Institute of Pharmacy Education and ResearchReviewed on 3 Sep 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Aditya Bangalore Institute of Pharmacy Education and Research.
reviews.review_text: For my course, they provided 24-hour Wi-Fi for college purposes. There were different labs for different subjects where we could conduct our experiments. The classrooms were technologically advanced, equipped with TVs and projectors, and were like smart classrooms.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Aditya Academy of Architecture and DesignReviewed on 15 Jul 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are provided at certain ranges (library, computer lab, wi-fi). Hostel facilities were in a certain range, quality of food was average, and there were no canteen facilities. There are no medical facilities or sports facilities. The quality of food is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Aditya College of PhysiotherapyReviewed on 16 Jun 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Excellent college to study physiotherapy in Bangalore.
reviews.review_text:
We have good Wi-Fi facilities in our college canteen. We have well-maintained labs with a good amount of equipment to conduct our respective experiments. We have lots of good books, which are really useful for us to gain knowledge. 
Our college is eco-friendly too .

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Aditya College of PhysiotherapyReviewed on 19 May 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Good college to study physiotherapy in Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: We have good Wi-Fi facilities throughout the college campus. Our college is completely eco friendly, there is no kind of pollution in the campus. We have very good books in our library to gain more knowledge. We have good food available in the canteen.
