reviews_list.review_title: If you get admission at A. V. P. T. I, go for it without thinking anything.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students choose to go for higher studies like B.E. or B.Tech. Some of them want placement, so our college provides good packages for them because they have a large network of companies. Some good companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, etc., come to recruit talent. In Diploma, you can expect an average package of 1-3 Lacs. Interested students get 100% placement and internship. Top roles can be as developers.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, we get the best computer labs with high-end specs, and the infrastructure is very nice. 24/7 Wi-Fi is available. In classrooms, there are digital boards to study, and there is also a big seminar hall where seminars are held. You will get better than what you expect from a government college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The Best Diploma College in Rajkot

review_content.Placements: Generally, at the diploma level, not many students are interested in placement. All students are considered for higher studies. About 4-8 students easily get a job from the Computer Science department. Approximately 520 students get placement from several departments like Electricity, ICT, Biomedical, etc., from the institute.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many facilities in A.V.P.T.I. College. Mainly in the Computer Science department, there are 5 computer labs, 7 classrooms with a seating capacity of 70-80 students, and 1 seminar hall. All classrooms have projector facilities. There is Wi-Fi available in all places in the department. There are separate hostels for boys and girls with some basic facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Best college Experience.

review_content.Placements: In our college, placements are not provided for our computer department. Other departments may arrange placements, and they are placed with very good salaries. The average package is 2.1 LPA in the electrical department and other departments. Mostly, students of the electrical department are going for the job, and the students in the computer department have to go for higher studies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Yes, our college infrastructure is in good condition. There are both hostels available for girls and boys, but our college does not provide a mess in the hostel or a canteen in the college. Other things like sports, games, and medical facilities are well managed. The hostel construction is the oldest, and it needs to be renovated in the boys' hostel, and especially in the girls' hostel, there is a need to start a mess because, without it, they have trouble eating.

individual_reviews.title: Best experience of college life at first site.

content.Placements: In our college AVPTI, placements are 10 to 20%. Students who are clever can get placements in some local companies. But we see other points of placements, that students are interested in higher education like degrees in different types of courses.
content.Infrastructure: AVPTI provides the best facilities like Wi-Fi, which can be used by any student of college. Other facilities like labs and rooms are very well and properly managed. New computers of high capabilities will be installed this year 2025 by the government.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the quality of education, faculty, and facilities.

content.Placements: I don't have exactly idea of total number of offers made, but I can confidently say that if you want a job you will get it. 100% students get the offers. My plan is to go for higher studies to any private university where the skill is important, not the marks, because I have very good experience with the college but not with University (GTU).

I am disappointed with the curriculum which is designed by Gujarat Technological University, which is not the latest need of the market. In the syllabus, you have to learn old technologies that were useful five years ago, and some things are deprecated and can’t even run; it’s in the syllabus.

admission_process.title: Government Polytechnic For Women, Guntur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Government Polytechnic For Women, Guntur admission 2025 is merit-based. To apply for the programmes offered, students need to clear the preset admission criteria. At Government Polytechnic For Women, Guntur, students can pursue wide range of programmes in fields, such as Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Design and Science.

Some of the popular Government Polytechnic For Women, Guntur programmes are D.Pharma and UG Diploma, etc at UG level and After 10th Diploma at After 10th level. These programmes are offered in full time mode. See below the key highlights for Government Polytechnic For Women, Guntur admissions:

Entrance into the programme depends on how well a candidate does in exams, such as AP POLYCET. faqs.question: How much is the intake across all courses being offerred at Government Polytechnic For Women, Guntur?
faqs.answer: The overall seats available across all courses offered by Government Polytechnic For Women, Guntur is up to 180. Good thing to know is that Government Polytechnic For Women, Guntur has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.
